title: The Classes Mod
description: A mod that adds new classes to the game that drastically affect gameplay.
body:
The Classes Mod adds different classes to the game that are intended to change the game a lot and add interesting new features. Use the "m" key to access the menu and get started. The current classes are: Soul, Chess, Fire, and Energy Manipulation. When you pick a class, you start with only one attack, but by crafting ability tokens you can gain more powers. This mod appeals to people who like awesome attacks and abilities that are made to look and feel powerful. TCM is intended mainly for PvP and multiplayer application, and some things may not work properly if used on bosses or multiple players have the same ability selected(this mostly won't be a problem.) This is my first mod, and as such has a minor amount of bugs and potential crashes. This mod has no dependencies except forge 1.20.1, but I would recommend a recipes mod like JEI, as there is no way implemented(yet) to find the recipes. Thanks for your attention, and I hope you enjoy.



No more content coming to this mod but my 1.21.4 remaster called 'The Classes Mod: Reborn' is in open beta on modrinth
